title: I am a newbie, I would like to ask why there is no linux in the release page of podman
body:
[podman-remote-static.tar.gz](https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/download/v4.2.1/podman-remote-static.tar.gz)
this is the linux version? like just a client

comments.body: Thanks for reaching out.  You can find the answer in another issue: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/15682
Should we document this on the RELEASE Page, since we are getting requests?
Do you mean the README?  It wouldn't hurt to have it, probably even at both locations.

No I am thinking on the releases page.

https://github.com/containers/podman/releases/tag/v4.2.1
